objective: Reach QQ Music search results, resolve a known OCR text anchor, click that anchor, and capture post-action evidence.

query.note: ASCII baseline avoids IME ambiguity during the first validation pass.

anchor_text.note: A visible OCR row-title anchor from the QQ音乐 search results list.

dismiss_overlay_key.note: Dismiss the lingering search suggestion overlay so OCR sees a cleaner result-list surface.

preconditions: QQ音乐 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.
The recipe runs on the live desktop and may briefly take pointer control during result selection.

notes: The search-entry phase now avoids pointer primitives by using a shortcut plus clipboard-backed paste.
The broader baseline explicitly dismisses the lingering search overlay before OCR inspects the row-anchor surface.
Stable concrete result selection is not yet proven without OCR/pointer fallback.
This recipe must not be advertised as non-disturbing.

steps.purpose: Bring QQ音乐 to the foreground before search submission and OCR observation.
Reveal and focus the QQ音乐 search surface through the known shortcut plus AX click.
Paste the query through the clipboard, then submit it and restore the prior clipboard snapshot.
Dismiss the QQ音乐 search suggestion overlay before OCR inspects the result-list region.
Wait until the target OCR anchor is actually visible inside the result-list region instead of assuming one fixed submit delay was enough.
Resolve a known OCR text anchor inside the QQ音乐 result-list region instead of scanning the whole screen.
Project the filtered OCR anchor back to logical coordinates and click it.
Capture post-click evidence for inspect and later distillation.

expected_signals: debug.pressKey succeeds for the known search shortcut.
debug.findScreenText reports at least one filtered match for ${anchor_text} inside the result-list region.
debug.clickScreenText emits a logicalPoint note and completes the click.
The post-click screenshot shows the target row selected or highlighted.
success_criteria: The result row is visually selected after the click.
non_goals: Playback activation is not yet proven.
This recipe does not assert that the selected row starts playing.

known_limits.black_box_region: QQ音乐 result rows remain visually accessible but weakly exposed through AX.
known_limits.user_disturbance: clickScreenText is still an intrusive pointer-level primitive on a live desktop.
known_limits.fallback_needed: If OCR cannot find the anchor, the caller must retry with a different visible anchor or a stronger visual strategy.
known_limits.region_tuning: The default OCR region ratios target the QQ音乐 result-list area and may need adjustment if the window layout changes.
known_limits.shared_app_state: This recipe should not run concurrently with other QQ音乐 recipes against the same live app instance.
